title: FinBERT Local Headline Scorer
summary: Replace or augment the current Yahoo RSS / Claude news scoring with the free ProsusAI/finbert model from HuggingFace. FinBERT is pre-trained on financial corpora and returns positive/negative/neutral softmax probabilities per headline, producing a clean [-1, +1] sentiment score. Kirtac & Germano (Finance Research Letters, 2024) found LLM-class models achieve 72-74% accuracy on 965K news articles versus 50.1% for legacy dictionaries — FinBERT sits at 72.2% — making it a near-free, high-accuracy scoring layer that runs locally without API latency or cost.
expected_impact: +3-5% signal accuracy on news dimension; reduces Claude API cost by offloading bulk article scoring to local model; 72%+ directional accuracy on financial headlines (Kirtac & Germano 2024)
